summary: Tested all new features: countdown timer with Twitter share, news scraper endpoints, community POI CRUD, time-travel map toggle with GTA V Scale overlay, and comparison slider. All features working correctly. 14/14 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: test_create_poi returns an ID but pytest warns about non-None return — minor, no action needed
News scraper error handling is silent (catch ignores errors in NewsSection.jsx) — acceptable for news feature but could show error state to user
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_ community POIs during testing; 1 test pin (Test Community Pin) left in DB from UI test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features in iteration 2 are working: countdown timer (220 days), Twitter share button with correct twitter.com/intent/tweet URL, news section shows 6 scraped GTA6 articles, POST /api/news/refresh triggers scrape, GTA V Scale toggle shows LOS SANTOS overlay with 2.1x annotation, community POI pins submit/appear as triangles on map/delete works, comparison slider has 5 tabs all functional.
